title: Spellbound
description: A mod focused around adding different items such as wands and scrolls that allow a user to cast an array of spells
body:
This mod is heavily centred around magic.

It includes:
- 5 different tiers of wands
- 7 different spells at different tiers
- a mana system
- custom potions for refilling mana
- flowers
- and a magic workbench - currently with no purpose

If you notice any issues with this, please contact me at italianchef123@hotmail.com, or at italianchef123 on discord
